string.value: MultiFrame Send Not Supported In Curretn Version
Std Frame ID Invalid, Valid Range:[0-0x7ff]
Ext Frame ID Invalid, Valid Range:[0-0x1fffffff]
Max Limit Item Countd %d，Please Delelte some items and retry!
FrameAnalyzer-working hard to load protocol file...
Standard SingleFilter (Contain ID, RTR and Data, Free Define)
Standard DualFilter (Contain ID, RTR and Data, Free Define)
Extend SingleFilter (Contain ID and RTR, Free Define)
Extend DualFilter (Contain part of ID, Free Define)
Set GUI as Office 2000 theme\nOffice 2000 theme
Set GUI as Office 2003 theme\nOffice 2003 theme
Set GUI as Office XP theme\nOffice XP theme
Set GUI as Windows XP theme\nWindows XP theme
Set GUI as Visual Studio 2005 theme\nVisual Studio 2005 theme
Please use memory mapped files if buffer size is larger than 6,000,000!
Save to File in Real Time\nSave in Real Time
Note:the data is only that in list when opened this dialog.It can't be updated real time.
It's a illegal file or It has been damaged
Can't send CAN frame to bus
The num of Frames in one send must be less than %d.

menuitem.caption: Save to File in Real Time

control.caption: Note:the data is only that in list when opened this dialog.It can't be updated real time.

note：
1.Max Filter Count :8.
2.Frame is compared with every filter item, if matched, frame is recieved.
3.Frame will not be recieved if none of the filter item matchs.
4.All frame will be recieved if one of the filter item is "Recv All".
Note: If bit box displays "X", means the bit is no care, e.g. if the ID filter is "XXX XXXXX111", means that only the three low bits are "111", the frame will be accepted.
Note: If bit box displays "X", means the bit is no care, e.g. if the ID filter is "XXX XXXXX111", means that only the three low bits are "111", the frame will be accepted.
Tip：Custom Baud my not accuracy as you set
